# MLB V15.11.1 historical daily-slate optimizer

- [ ] Contract CI passes.
- [ ] No paid historical request ran as part of this pull request.
- [ ] No production cutover ran as part of this pull request.
- [ ] Existing MLB production authority remains unchanged.
- [ ] Automatic wagering remains disabled.
- [ ] A future promotion requires 1000/200/200 chronological evidence.
- [ ] Every complete validation and untouched-audit slate must be at least 80% accurate.
- [ ] The 90% figure remains a stretch target, not an unsupported guarantee.
- [ ] Missing, extra, or duplicate game predictions fail the date.
- [ ] T-minus-45 leakage controls and 1:00 a.m. ET / 15-minute cadence are preserved.
- [ ] Legacy selection authority is removed only by the explicit write-once cutover after the real evidence gate passes.
